lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or cosmetic blemishes. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, truly a collector-grade example. The paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine, and there are no chips, scratches, or imperfections to be found anywhere on the body. Inside, the interior is pristine; the leather remains soft and supple with no signs of wear, and all electronic features function exactly as they did the day the car left the factory. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history. This car drives like new and represents a rare opportunity for a buyer seeking a vehicle in its highest possible state of preservation.

Get ready to drive home a dependable vehicle that’s ready for its next adventure! This car is a fantastic option for someone looking for a functional and reliable daily driver. While it shows some honest signs of age and wear consistent with its journey so far, it remains a solid performer that's ready to hit the road. It’s a great value for anyone seeking a practical and honest ride!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows heavy wear, including multiple large dents, peeling clear coat, and visible rust on the rocker panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained and has several significant tears. Mechanically, the engine starts but has a persistent knock, and the transmission slips when shifting. It is being sold strictly as-is and is likely best suited as a parts car or a major project for an experienced mechanic.

The car is in fair condition. It shows visible cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are functional, though some components may require maintenance or repair in the near future.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished synthesis of performance and long-term value. Exhibiting commendable mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for reliability. A premier acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking a sophisticated and dependable transport solution.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. It runs great and is just waiting for someone new to take it on some adventures. Come check it out—you’re gonna love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. The chassis has been addressed with a comprehensive rear subframe reinforcement and a full cooling system overhaul. Mechanical highlights include a recent VANOS unit rebuild, valve lash adjustment, and the installation of poly-bushing control arms for sharpened turn-in response. Power is delivered through the factory Variable M Differential Lock, ensuring optimal traction under load. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the drivetrain remains robust, benefiting from a recent rod bearing service and a direct-shift linkage upgrade. This is a mechanically sorted performance machine optimized for lateral grip and linear power delivery.
Reliable vehicle in good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Interior is well-kept.

Experience the perfect balance of performance and reliability with this well-maintained vehicle. Finished in a classic deep metallic paint that still holds a beautiful shine, the exterior shows only the minor road wear expected of a car that’s been enjoyed and cared for. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is clean and free of major blemishes, and all electronics—including the premium audio system and climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is sound, having undergone regular servicing with recent oil changes and tire rotations. It drives smoothly, handles with precision, and is ready for its next owner to take it on many more adventures. A solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking quality without the showroom price tag.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This unit has been curated for its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation, offering an exceptional ownership experience. Meticulously inspected to ensure consistent performance, it stands as a testament to diligent maintenance and sophisticated engineering. We invite the discerning buyer to acquire this high-caliber asset at a valuation that reflects its enduring quality and market distinction.

We are pleased to present this expertly maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic consistency. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Representing a compelling value proposition, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, making it an ideal selection for the discerning motorist seeking long-term dependability.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it's looking for a new home. It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really great shape for its next adventure! Everything runs smoothly, the interior is super comfy, and it's just a joy to drive. You're going to love how it handles on the road! Feel free to reach out if you want to come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Clean title. Regular maintenance. Minor surface wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience that perfectly balances performance and comfort. The exterior retains a vibrant finish, showing only minor signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and free of major curbing. Step inside to find a pristine, smoke-free interior where the premium upholstery has been preserved with care and all technological features function as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having undergone regular servicing and a recent multi-point inspection to ensure smooth handling and reliable power delivery. It is a complete package for a discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality ride that has been treated with respect throughout its ownership.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. A premier choice for the discerning motorist seeking reliability without compromise.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and prestige. Every detail reflects a commitment to quality, ensuring this selection stands as a premier investment in its category.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape—it's been well-maintained and still has plenty of adventures left in it. You might find a few tiny signs of character here and there, but it runs beautifully and is super reliable. Perfect for someone looking for a great, dependable car without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS for exceptional throttle response. The powertrain is mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque vectoring. This vehicle has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement. The suspension retains its signature handling characteristics with refreshed bushings and a rigid chassis, while the hydraulic rack-and-pinion steering provides unparalleled feedback. Mechanically sound and aesthetically well-preserved, it represents a balanced blend of analog engagement and performance reliability.
Well-maintained vehicle. Runs well. Clean title. Minor interior wear.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership, while the interior features premium upholstery that has been kept smoke-free and professionally cleaned. Mechanically, the car is in solid shape; the engine delivers consistent power and the transmission shifts smoothly through every gear. All onboard electronics, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, are fully operational. Complete with a documented service history showing regular oil changes and recent brake maintenance, this car offers a dependable and stylish driving experience for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and remains a testament to durable engineering and careful ownership, providing exceptional value within its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years. You might find a tiny scratch here or there from normal use, but honestly, it runs like a dream and is totally ready for its next adventure! Perfect for someone looking for a reliable, comfy ride without the brand-new price tag. I'd love for it to go to a good home, so come take it for a spin!

This A80-generation icon is powered by the venerable 2JZ-GTE inline-six, featuring sequential twin-turbochargers and the robust Getrag V160 six-speed manual transmission. The drivetrain is mechanically stout, delivering linear power through a factory Torsen limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive timing belt service and a pressure test of the forced induction system to ensure peak boost response. The double-wishbone suspension remains taut, providing the precise turn-in and lateral stability expected of this chassis. Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, high-performing daily driver. The exterior retains a deep luster with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible use, while the interior remains exceptionally clean, smoke-free, and features well-preserved upholstery. Mechanically, the car is in strong working order; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission is responsive, and all onboard electronics—from the navigation system to the dual-zone climate control—function as intended. Recent preventative maintenance, including a full fluid flush and brake inspection, ensures it is ready for the road. It offers a perfect balance of comfort and longevity for the discerning buyer.
